services.title: Torsion Spring Replacement
services.blurb: Same-day residential torsion spring replacement, in pairs.
services.body: Torsion springs are the highest-tension component in your garage. A broken spring turns a 200-pound door into a hazard the opener can't lift. We replace springs in pairs, sized to your exact door weight, with wind-count matched to travel — so both springs wear evenly and last their full cycle rating.

services.title: Opener Repair & Installation
services.blurb: Belt, chain, and jackshaft openers from LiftMaster and Genie.
services.body: We service every major opener brand and install new belt-drive, chain-drive, and jackshaft openers with battery backup, Wi-Fi control, and camera. Every install includes new safety sensor alignment and force-limit calibration to UL 325.

services.title: Cable & Roller Replacement
services.blurb: Frayed cables, worn rollers, and off-track doors.
services.body: Frayed cables snap without warning and drop the door. We replace lift cables in pairs, upgrade builder-grade steel rollers to nylon (quieter, longer life), and re-track doors that have jumped off the horizontal rails after an impact.

services.title: Panel Replacement
services.blurb: Match and replace damaged garage door panels.
services.body: A single dented panel doesn't always mean a new door. We identify the manufacturer, gauge, and stamp pattern and order matching sections whenever they're still in production — cutting your repair cost by 60–80% compared to a full door replacement.

services.title: New Door Installation
services.blurb: Insulated steel, carriage-house, and custom wood doors.
services.body: A new door is one of the highest-ROI exterior upgrades on a home. We install insulated steel doors from Clopay, Amarr, and Wayne Dalton, plus custom carriage-house and full-view aluminum designs — all with matching hardware, insulation, and weather sealing.

services.title: Off-Track Repair
services.blurb: Reset doors that have jumped their tracks after an impact.
services.body: Off-track doors are usually the result of a bumper tap or a broken cable. We inspect the tracks, rollers, and cables for hidden damage, then reset the door and re-tension the springs — often on the first visit.

services.title: Annual Tune-Up
services.blurb: Lubrication, balance test, safety sensor check, and force calibration.
services.body: A 30-minute annual tune-up catches worn rollers, loose hardware, and dying springs before they strand you outside. Every tune-up includes UL 325 safety reversal tests on both the auto-reverse and the photo eyes.
